roadmap_anchor: cluster #31 improvement 10 — gradient mask AN11 violate
purpose: SSOT for AN11-violate gradient masking: given per-sample cert verdicts (AN11 triple a/b/c) and a batch gradient matrix, zero or down-scale rows whose sample verdict = FAIL, so structurally-inadmissible samples do NOT contribute to the weight update.

cert_fields.triple_aggregation_rule: any-FAIL → row_FAIL (conservative: one axis violation suffices to suppress)

raw_compliance.raw#9: hexa-only, deterministic, no LLM inference in mask op
raw_compliance.raw#10: proof-carrying — selftest emits all_pass=true only when S1∧S2∧S3 green
raw_compliance.raw#12: no cherry-pick — mask decision purely from cert_verdicts input, no verdict reordering / dropping
raw_compliance.raw#15: no hardcoded path — config consumed via explicit config_path arg

cert_gate_dependency.current: MOCK — per-sample verdicts provided inline by caller
cert_gate_dependency.post_a3_wire: swap MOCK with tool/cert_gate.hexa per-sample output (TODO[cert_gate_wire])
cert_gate_dependency.contract: caller supplies list<string> cert_verdicts_per_sample with len == rows(batch_grad_matrix)
